title: Dynamic + subquery composition
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.Search.with_filters_and_subqueries/1` that takes opts with optional `:name` and `:has_posts` (boolean). If `:name` present, filter by ilike on name. If `:has_posts == true`, add `where: exists(subquery(posts_by_user))`. Both optional. Both use dynamic/2 for composition. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts/search.ex`.
tier_rationale: Combining dynamic with exists+subquery is non-trivial; `exists` inside a dynamic requires care.
